_readme2: ║   AMARA NOORS — FULL SITE CONTROL FILE              ║
_readme3: ║   Edit this file to change ANYTHING on the website. ║
_readme4: ║   No coding needed. Save the file, reload browser.  ║

site.author: Amara Noors
site.tagline: Words that rewire how you see yourself.
site.heroSubtext: Words that rewire how you see yourself — and what you're capable of becoming.
site.scarcityBarText: 🔥 Limited Offer — Buy Any Book for $7.99 — Free Chapter Included

youtube.description: Deep-dives into the philosophy behind the books. New video every week.

instagram.description: Daily quotes, writing process and behind-the-scenes of the creative life.

bundle.title: All 3 Books
bundle.description: The full Amara Noors library — save over 30% when you grab every title together.

books.title: Something Like Gravity
books.description: A raw exploration of how invisible forces shape our choices — and how to bend them in your favour.
books.longDescription: Something Like Gravity dives deep into the unseen patterns that govern our decisions — fear, identity, belief, and the stories we tell ourselves. Amara Noors weaves philosophy, psychology and personal narrative into a guide that doesn't just inspire — it rewires.

books.title: Journey Of Success
books.description: The unfiltered roadmap from where you are to where you've always known you could be.
books.longDescription: Journey Of Success strips away the clichés and gets honest about what building a meaningful life actually requires. Part memoir, part manual — this book walks with you through the discomfort of change and out the other side.

books.title: Transform Your Mindset
books.description: Dismantle the thought patterns holding you back. Build the mind that builds the life.
books.longDescription: Transform Your Mindset is a practical, unflinching examination of cognitive habits and how to replace them. Drawing from neuroscience, stoic philosophy and lived experience, Amara shows you the exact shifts that make transformation not just possible — but inevitable.

_howToEdit.1 ADD a new book: Copy any book {} block. Paste it after the last book (before the ] bracket). Change all fields. Set  'visible': true
_howToEdit.2 HIDE a book: Set  'visible': false  — book disappears without deleting the data.
_howToEdit.3 CHANGE buy link: Set  buyLink  to any URL — Etsy, Gumroad, PayPal, your own site.
_howToEdit.4 CHANGE button text: Set  buyButtonText  e.g.  'Get it Now'  or  'Buy $12.99'.
_howToEdit.5 CHANGE price: Edit  price. Add  priceOld  with old value to show a strikethrough price.
_howToEdit.6 CHANGE image: Put file in img/ folder. Set  image  to  'img/yourfile.jpg'
_howToEdit.7 CHANGE PDF preview: Put file in preview/ folder. Set  previewPdf  to  'preview/yourfile.pdf'. Set  showPreview: false  to hide the preview button.
_howToEdit.8 Open link new tab: Set  buyNewTab: true  for external links (Etsy etc). Set  false  for same tab.
_howToEdit.10 CHANGE stats: Edit the  site.stats  array — number and label for each stat bubble.
_howToEdit.11 CHANGE social links: Edit  site.social  — url, handle, and counts for YouTube / Instagram / X.
_howToEdit.13 CHANGE logo: Replace AN.png in the img/ folder, or set  site.logo  to a new path.
_howToEdit.14 CHANGE scarcity bar: Edit  site.scarcityBarText  — the text in the top gold strip.
